title: Code Comment Generation
scenario: Generate code comments for a Python function that calculates the area of a rectangle. The comments should explain what the function does, how it works, and any edge cases. The LLM output should be in Markdown format and must include at least 3 comments.
constraints: Must include a description of the function's purpose
Must explain how the function works
Must include comments on edge cases

evaluationCriteria.description: The comments must describe the function's purpose
The comments must explain how the function works
The comments must include at least one edge case explanation
The LLM output must be at most 100 words
